item.title: RigLab Preview: overview
item.author: Cesar Saez
item.description: Second video preview of the upcoming rigging framework riglab.

item.title: Driving serialization via dunder methods
item.author: Cesar Saez
item.description: Article on how riglab's serialize/deserialize programmatic objects via serialized metadata and python magic methods.

item.title: Git For Softimage
item.author: Cesar Saez
item.description: Open source integration of Git as version control system for Softimage projects.

item.title: RigLab Preview: Solvers
item.author: Cesar Saez
item.description: Early preview of the rigging framework I've been working on.

item.title: RigIcon
item.author: Cesar Saez
item.description: Preview of a tool to create and manage animation controls.
